reviews.comment:
El estado general de la estación de servicio no condice con el de un automóvil club argentino. Muy antigua y poco mantenimiento.

(Translated by Google)
The service station's general condition is not in keeping with that of an Argentine automobile club. It's very old and poorly maintained.

reviews.comment:
Es una Acá normal la atención de los plateros es excelente! Me recomendaron una ruta que cambio mis vacaciones de 10!! Me pareció caro el shop

(Translated by Google)
It's a normal shop here. The silversmiths' service is excellent! They recommended a route that changed my vacation for a thousand times! I thought the shop was expensive.

reviews.comment:
Hace falta una renovación en esta estación, es muy concurrida y le falta variedad y sobre todo falta lugar para cargar combustible. Espero llegue pronto la reforma.

(Translated by Google)
This station needs a renovation; it's very busy and lacks variety, and especially fuel storage. I hope the renovation comes soon.

reviews.comment:
Si te sobra 1 hora, andá a cargar aquí....no apta para ansiosos ni personas haciendo ruta.....a la modorra normal de los ACA, aquí agregale 50% más....

(Translated by Google)
If you have an hour to spare, go fill up here... not suitable for impatient people or those on long journeys... add 50% more to the usual slowness of the ACA stations here...
